language.title: Language
language.restartHint: System controls (calendar, dialogs) will switch language after the app restarts

about.title: About
about.description: Knigotrek is a free, open-source application (MIT license).
about.supportPrefix: Like it? The best support is a ⭐ star on GitHub:
about.safety: Download Knigotrek only from the official GitHub repository — we can't vouch for the safety of copies from third-party sites.
about.donatePrefix: Want to chip in? Entirely optional, changes nothing:

notifications.title: Reminders
notifications.requestPrompt: Allow notifications so Knigotrek can remind you to write every day
notifications.blockedTitle: Notifications are blocked in the browser
notifications.blockedHint: Allow them in your browser settings (the lock icon to the left of the address bar)
notifications.timeHint: Every day at this time you'll get a reminder
notifications.enabledBody: Notifications enabled! Now you won't forget to write 📝
notifications.testBody: Even 200 characters is progress. Open the app and get started! 📝
notifications.howItWorks1: Notifications only work while the browser is open
notifications.howItWorks2: A reminder arrives once a day at the chosen time
notifications.howItWorks3: You can turn it off at any time

backups.title: Automatic backups
backups.enabledHint: Backups are created every day at 2:00 AM and the last 7 days are kept.
backups.browserOnly: Automatic backups are available only in the desktop version.
backups.browserOnlyHint: In the browser, use manual data export.

hiddenProjects.title: Hidden projects ({{count}})
hiddenProjects.description: Projects you've hidden from the list. You can restore them at any time.

data.title: Export/Import data
data.importSuccess: Data imported successfully! The page will be reloaded.
data.importError: Error importing data. Check the file format.
data.hint: Export your data before updating the browser or to transfer it to another device

tray.title: Window behavior
tray.trayLabel: Minimize to tray on window close
tray.trayHint: The app keeps running in the background (backups and the evening reminder keep working). Quit via File → Quit or from the tray.
